items.title: The Thunder return for Paul George, 7 years after his trade to the Clippers:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
The Thunder return for Paul George, 7 years after his trade to the Clippers:

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander
Danilo Gallinari
Jalen Williams (#12 pick in 2022)
Thomas Sorber (#15 pick in 2025)
Brooks Barnhizer (#44 pick in 2025)
Aday Mara (#12 pick in 2026)

1 piece left: 2027 Spurs FRP (protected).

items.title: Chris Cenac Jr. was a consenus 5-star recruit & ranked No. 7 in the nation. He chose to go to a demanding, hard-nosed program in Houston.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Chris Cenac Jr. was a consenus 5-star recruit & ranked No. 7 in the nation. He chose to go to a demanding, hard-nosed program in Houston.

What the 19-year-old showed under Kelvin Sampson, combined with his physical & athletic gifts is why the Celtics bet on what he'll do in their infrastructure.

items.title: Signing Reaves to a max would've taken some maneuvering for the Pistons.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Signing Reaves to a max would've taken some maneuvering for the Pistons. 

Cap space route would've been renouncing Harris, Huerter, Beasley, and Green in free agency, waiving Robinson and Reed, declining Tolu Smith's option and then trading either Stew or LeVert (likely Stew).
